user_query: I'm a beginner in sports betting and want to familiarize myself with surebets. Can you provide me with a comprehensive list of all supported bookmakers and their corresponding surebets? Also, I would like to know the profit margin and odds for each surebet.

TaskList.description: Retrieve a comprehensive list of all supported bookmakers.
For each bookmaker, fetch the corresponding surebets.
Calculate the profit margin and odds for each surebet.
